item.name: Ads

description.content: Manage ad configurations within campaigns. Ads define the creative content, delivery schedules, targeting rules, and placement assignments that determine how and where advertising is served to users.

item.name: Google Campaign Manager List Ads

request.name: Google Campaign Manager List Ads

description.content: Retrieves a list of ads, possibly filtered. Results are returned in descending order by last modified time. Use query parameters to filter by campaign, advertiser, type, or other criteria.

query.description: Select only ads belonging to these campaigns.
Select only ads belonging to these campaigns.
Select only ads belonging to these advertisers.
Select only ads belonging to these advertisers.
Select only ads with these IDs.
Select only ads with these IDs.
Select only ads with these placement IDs assigned.
Select only ads with these placement IDs assigned.
Select only ads with the specified type.
Select only active ads.
Select only archived ads.
Search string for filtering results. Matches against ad name and ID fields.
Maximum number of results to return. Default is 1000.
Value of the nextPageToken from the previous result page.

variable.description: (Required) The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

response.name: List of ads.

variable.description: (Required) The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

request.name: Google Campaign Manager Create an Ad

description.content: Inserts a new ad. The ad is created under the specified campaign and advertiser with the provided delivery, creative rotation, and targeting configuration.

variable.description: (Required) The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

response.name: Created ad.

variable.description: (Required) The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

item.name: Campaigns

description.content: Manage advertising campaigns. Campaigns serve as top-level organizational containers that group ads, placements, and creatives under a single advertiser with shared start and end dates, budgets, and targeting configurations.

item.name: Google Campaign Manager List Campaigns

request.name: Google Campaign Manager List Campaigns

description.content: Retrieves a list of campaigns, possibly filtered. Results are returned in descending order by last modified time. Use query parameters to filter by advertiser, archive status, search string, or specific campaign IDs.

query.description: Select only campaigns that belong to these advertisers.
Select only campaigns that belong to these advertisers.
Select only campaigns with these IDs.
Select only campaigns with these IDs.
Search string for filtering results. Matches against campaign name and ID fields.
Select only archived campaigns. Default is false.
Field by which to sort the list.
Order of sorted results.
Maximum number of results to return. Default is 1000.
Value of the nextPageToken from the previous result page.

variable.description: (Required) The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

response.name: List of campaigns.

variable.description: (Required) The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

variable.description: (Required) The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

response.name: Created campaign.

item.name: Placements

description.content: Manage placements representing ad inventory on publisher sites. Placements define the size, format, pricing, and site location where ads can be served, and generate the ad tags that publishers install on their pages.

item.name: Google Campaign Manager List Placements

request.name: Google Campaign Manager List Placements

description.content: Retrieves a list of placements, possibly filtered. Results are returned in descending order by last modified time.

query.description: Select only placements belonging to these campaigns.
Select only placements belonging to these campaigns.
Select only placements belonging to these advertisers.
Select only placements belonging to these advertisers.
Select only placements with these IDs.
Select only placements with these IDs.
Select only placements associated with these sites.
Select only placements associated with these sites.
Select only placements belonging to these placement groups.
Select only placements belonging to these placement groups.
Select only placements with these compatibilities.
Search string for filtering results.
Maximum number of results to return. Default is 1000.
Value of the nextPageToken from the previous result page.

variable.description: (Required) The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

response.name: List of placements.

variable.description: (Required) The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

response.name: Created placement.

item.name: Reports

description.content: Create, configure, and run reports to analyze campaign performance. Reports support multiple types including standard, reach, path to conversion, cross-dimension reach, floodlight, and cross-media reach, with configurable dimensions, metrics, and date ranges.

item.name: Google Campaign Manager Run a Report

request.name: Google Campaign Manager Run a Report

description.content: Runs a report. The report is executed asynchronously. Use the files endpoint to check report completion status and download the generated report file.

query.description: If set to true, tries to run the report synchronously. If the report is too large for synchronous processing, it runs asynchronously instead.

variable.description: (Required) The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.
(Required) The ID of the report.

response.name: Report file metadata for the initiated run.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Campaign Manager 360 API

description.content:
The Campaign Manager 360 API (formerly DoubleClick Campaign Manager) provides programmatic access to manage digital advertising campaigns, ads, placements, and reports. Use this API to automate trafficking workflows, create and manage campaign structures, configure ad placements across publisher sites, and generate comprehensive reporting data for campaign performance analysis. The API supports the full campaign lifecycle from creation through reporting and optimization.

Contact Support:
 Name: Google Campaign Manager 360 API Support
